scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-extrabold text-slate-900

spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 lg:gap-8

navbar.style: Glassmorphism over Hero / Solid white on scroll. Sticky top, z-50
navbar.links: Hidden on mobile behind hamburger menu. Visible on desktop. Text: Manrope, font-medium, hover:text-[#2E5A6E].
navbar.cta: Book a Consultation button (Solid Primary bg, white text, rounded-md, hover:bg-[#1E3D4A])

hero.layout: Left-aligned content with a subtle background image overlay or a clean split layout.
hero.background: Soft #E8F0F4 or white with very subtle gradients. Not dark.
hero.motto: You Care For Your Patients, We Care For You
hero.cta: Primary action 'Book a Consultation' linking to booking flow.

service_cards.layout: Grid with 11 items. 3 columns on desktop. Clean white background, 1px subtle border.
service_cards.icons: Lucide-react icons in a soft circle background (bg-[#E8F0F4], text-[#2E5A6E]).

stats_process.style: Dark section (bg-[#2E5A6E]) with white text, or clean white with primary borders.

booking_form.layout: Multi-step form using Shadcn Card. Max width 2xl mx-auto.
booking_form.accents: Progress bar using primary color. Enforce business hours: Mon-Sun 9 AM - 6 PM EST.

admin_dashboard.layout: Sidebar + Main content area. Clean, cardless or simple table design.
admin_dashboard.table: Shadcn Table for bookings and contacts. High density, clear typography.

footer.layout: Dark background (bg-[#1E3D4A]). 4 columns: Logo/About, Quick Links, Services, Contact.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Manrope for all headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Do NOT use placeholder images; use the provided media URLs.
Use the primary color (#2E5A6E) for CTAs, active states, and dark sections.
Ensure the booking form restricts times to Mon-Sun 9 AM - 6 PM EST.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements to support testability.
Build the dashboard using Shadcn Table component. Keep it lightweight.
Marketing sections should use generous padding (py-24 or py-32).
Avoid completely transparent headers if content scrolls underneath; use backdrop-blur and a semi-transparent white/bg.

Use the 11 specific services outlined: ERA Enrollment, Credentialing, Medical Coding, Charge Entry, Payment Posting, EDI Rejection, AR Followup, Denial Followup, Correspondence & Documentation, Patient Statement, Appeal Submission, Credit Balance.
